name: @appstrate/add-memory
description: Save a discovery or learning as a long-term memory. Supports per-actor and shared scopes.

tool.name: add_memory
tool.description: Save a discovery or learning as a long-term memory. By default memories are scoped to the current actor (the user or end-user that triggered the run); pass scope="shared" for an app-wide memory visible to every actor.

scope.description: Persistence scope: "actor" (default) keeps the memory private to the run's actor; "shared" makes it app-wide.
